subcodes.first_line: God hath heard the call of them that have turned unto His Countenance and believed in God, the One, the All-Forgiving, and hath answered them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ندآء الذین اقبلوا الی الوجه و آمنوا بالله الواحد الغفار و اجابهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude
